title: The Boy Who Shattered Time
identity: A prodigy from the rough streets of Zaun, Ekko manipulates time to twist any situation to his advantage. Using his own invention, the Z-Drive, he thrives in pressure mixups and burst mobility.
playstyle: Mixup. A prodigy from the rough streets of Zaun, Ekko manipulates time to twist any situation to his advantage. Using his own invention, the Z-Drive, he thrives in pressure mixups and burst mobility.
strengths: Technical mixup character with movement and time-themed pressure.
Can create layered offense when setup timing is understood.
Rewards players who like labbing routes and reset structures.
weaknesses: Execution and setup timing can raise the learning curve.
Needs reviewed data before making firm partner claims.
partnerWants: Partners who create time to layer mix
teamProvides: Technical mixup character with movement and time-themed pressure.
Can create layered offense when setup timing is understood.
learningPriorities: Learn time-clone movement and pressure timing.
Practice tag sequences that preserve ambiguity.
